description: Detect-only pack for Delphi web frameworks. IntraWeb and uniGUI are not VCL-to-FMX UI libraries; they require architecture-level web or FMX redesign instead of automatic component substitution.

rules.manual_review_reason: IntraWeb forms are web forms, not FMX forms. Migration requires architecture-level redesign.
IntraWeb controls execute in a browser/server lifecycle and should not be automatically converted to FMX controls.
IntraWeb edit controls require web-framework or app-architecture migration.
IntraWeb memo controls require web-framework or app-architecture migration.
IntraWeb labels render HTML and should be reviewed in the web/app migration plan.
IntraWeb controls use browser/server state and should not be auto-converted.
IntraWeb combo boxes require web-framework or app-architecture migration.
IntraWeb list controls require web-framework or app-architecture migration.
IntraWeb image/resource handling requires manual migration.
IntraWeb layout regions require manual FMX or web layout redesign.
IntraWeb grids require web-framework or app-architecture migration.
IntraWeb data grids require web-framework/data architecture migration.
uniGUI forms are web application forms, not FMX forms. Migration requires architecture-level redesign.
uniGUI controls use Ext JS/web lifecycle and should not be automatically converted to FMX.
uniGUI edit controls require web-framework or app-architecture migration.
uniGUI memo controls require web-framework or app-architecture migration.
uniGUI labels are browser-rendered controls and require migration planning.
uniGUI controls use web state and should not be auto-converted.
uniGUI combo boxes require web-framework or app-architecture migration.
uniGUI data-aware controls require web/data architecture migration.
uniGUI data-aware controls require web/data architecture migration.
uniGUI data grids require web/data architecture migration.
uniGUI panels are web layout controls and require manual UI redesign.
uniGUI page controls require web/app architecture migration.
uniGUI tab sheets require web/app architecture migration.
uniGUI application modules are architecture-level web framework components.
uniGUI server modules are architecture-level web framework components.
